violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean the exteriors of the cabinets and refrigeration units.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Cups, straws, napkins stored below sewage and water lines.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material - windex and dish soap - was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Ensure hair is restrained.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Ensure a sani bucket is set up at all times during operation.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal wooden shelves downstairs.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Cups, lids, straws, napkins need to be stored off the floor and out from under water and sewage lines.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Cover the open pvc pipe in dry storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Seal/cover holes in ceilins an wall in dry storage to prevent entrance of pests.
